The most affordable alternative to Supabase and Firebase. Spin up a managed PostgreSQL database in seconds — no credit card, no config, no drama.

Get started free →View pricing

Why Developers Choose DBaaS.dev

A managed DBaaS alternative built for people who care about shipping fast and spending less.

⚡

Instant Postgres, Zero Config

Spin up a fully managed PostgreSQL database in under 30 seconds. No Kubernetes YAML, no connection pooling setup — just a connection string and you're building.

💸

Cheaper than Supabase & Firebase

Same managed PostgreSQL experience at a fraction of the cost — designed for lean teams and indie hackers who don't want to pay enterprise prices.

🆓

Genuinely Free to Start

The free tier has no credit card and no trial period. Ship your side project, validate your idea, and only pay when you actually need more resources.

🚀

Built for Startups & Side Projects

From prototype to first thousand users. No overprovisioning, no lock-in — reliable cheap Postgres hosting that stays out of your way.

Everything you need, nothing you don't

Postgres, an API, and a bridge to your AI assistant. That's it.

Ephemeral DBs→

Throwaway Postgres in 30s, no auth. Auto-deletes after up to 60 min.

Persistent DBs→

Production Postgres on K8s. Free tier, no credit card.

AI integrations→

Remote MCP for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor. A2A agent card. ChatGPT Actions.

REST API→

OpenAPI 3.2 spec. Bearer-key auth. Run SQL, manage backups, metrics.

Backups→

Hourly pg_dump to S3. 7-day retention. One-click restore.

API keys→

Generate, scope, revoke. Bcrypt-hashed at rest. Per-user rate limits.

The Most Affordable PostgreSQL Hosting for Indie Hackers

If you've looked at Supabase or Firebase for your next project, you already know the problem: pricing scales fast, and free tiers expire before you've validated your idea. DBaaS.dev is a cheap Postgres hosting alternative built specifically for indie hackers, solo founders, and small startups who need a real managed PostgreSQL database without paying enterprise prices.

Unlike other DBaaS platforms, there's no credit card required to get started. Spin up an instant Postgres database in under 30 seconds, get a connection string, and ship. When your side project grows, upgrade to a paid plan — still far cheaper than comparable services.

Why DBaaS.dev is the Best Database for Startups

Most database hosting services are designed for large teams with big budgets. DBaaS.dev is the opposite — a managed DBaaS optimised for lean teams and solo developers who want managed PostgreSQL without the overhead. No SLAs to negotiate, no sales calls, no surprise bills. Just fast, affordable Postgres hosting that stays out of your way.

Whether you're building a SaaS MVP, a personal project, or testing a new idea — DBaaS.dev gives you reliable, managed PostgreSQL at a price that makes sense for early-stage development.

Free Tools & Guides

Run live databases in your browser or learn how to set up Postgres for your stack.

Ephemeral Postgres →
Instant PostgreSQL session in your browser. No signup, no install.
Online MySQL Compiler →
Run real MySQL 8.0 queries in your browser. Free, no account required.
Postgres on Docker →
How to run PostgreSQL in Docker and Docker Compose with persistent volumes.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is DBaaS.dev a Supabase alternative?

Yes. DBaaS.dev is a self-hosted DBaaS that gives you instant managed PostgreSQL without the Supabase price tag. If you just need a reliable Postgres database — without the full backend platform — DBaaS.dev is a simpler and significantly cheaper alternative.

Is DBaaS.dev a Firebase alternative?

If you're using Firebase purely for its database (Firestore) and want a SQL-based alternative, DBaaS.dev gives you a fully managed PostgreSQL database at a fraction of the cost. It's a great Firebase alternative for teams that prefer relational data.

How cheap is PostgreSQL hosting on DBaaS.dev?

DBaaS.dev is one of the cheapest ways to get a managed Postgres database. The Developer tier is completely free — ideal for side projects, prototypes, and staging. Paid plans are priced to be the most affordable self-hosted DBaaS option for indie hackers and early-stage startups.

Is DBaaS.dev good for indie hackers and side projects?

Absolutely. DBaaS.dev was built with indie hackers and solo developers in mind — instant Postgres with zero configuration, a free tier, and affordable paid plans. No sales calls, no enterprise contracts, just a database that works.

What is the best database for startups?

PostgreSQL is the most popular choice for startups — it's reliable, open source, and scales well. DBaaS.dev lets you start with a free managed Postgres instance and upgrade as you grow, making it one of the best and most affordable database options for early-stage startups.

Is DBaaS.dev free?

Yes, the 'Developer' tier is completely free — no credit card required. It is designed for indie hackers, hobbyists, and students who need a quick Postgres database for side projects.

Are the plans suitable for production?

The free Developer tier is best for staging and side projects. For production workloads, we offer dedicated plans — contact us at contact@dbaas.dev and we will outmatch any competitor's price.

How can I contact you for partnership or pricing questions?

For partnership inquiries, custom pricing, or general questions, email us at contact@dbaas.dev.
